feat.name: Interposing Crowd
feat.text: Your enemies can’t stop you when there’s a host of people between you. Your movement actions don’t trigger reactions as long as you remain in a crowd for the entire duration of the action.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
